title: The Economist (Web Edition) 07-03-2026 - Part 74
content:
See above, but I have no sense of work-life boundaries.

I hope you’re having a great weekend.

Guess what? It’s Friday.

I hope you have had a great week.

It’s now Tuesday, Wednesday or Thursday.

I hope your week is going well.

See above, but it’s Monday afternoon.

I hope your week is off to a good start.

write “I hope you are well” for the billionth time.

Actual meaning: It’s Monday morning and I cannot be bothered to fulfilling lives outside work.
